name: Bus & History Inspector
tagline: Lets the assistant look up what is in your queue, search past items, and summarise recent runs — just ask.
description:
Built-in tool worker that exposes Item Bus queries and run history to the BFrost assistant. Use natural language to ask what news articles are queued, look up recent research notes, or check how a job performed last week.

This is a core infrastructure worker — it ships with every BFrost installation and cannot be removed.
author: @bfrost

versions.changelog: Ships with BFrost. No standalone install needed.
